title: Caramel's Smoother Minecraft+
description: Just Make your Minecraft Smoother & Added some Tweaks!
body:
## **_A Modpack that makes Minecraft run Smoother & added some QOL Mods!_**
This mobpack aims to **optimize** Minecraft to run smoother, also **Ideal** for players who want to have some **tweaks/QOL** mods to make Minecraft better, but still have a feeling of **Vanilla Minecraft.**

_(PS You can disable or delete some mods/tweaks that you don't like in the content list menu)_
